content.en:
"There is an Ancient Demon-level Heaven Devouring Demon Dragon sleeping in the Dragon Swallowing Pond, no wonder the Dragon Disciple Tribe does not dare to completely occupy this place, they don't even have the qualifications to stuff the teeth of the Ancient Demon-level Sky Devouring Demon Dragon. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Moreover, this Sky Devouring Demon Dragon was only asleep and was not sealed, so it is estimated that even the Golden God Department would not dare to provoke it.

It's just that for some reason, this ancient demon-level Sky Devouring Demon Dragon is asleep, it may be a heavy injury or other circumstances, causing him to fall into a deep sleep and dare not wake up.

But even if he didn't wake up, just the eight-headed emperor-level Sky Swallowing Demon Dragon, no emperor-level emperor would dare to disturb the sleeping Ancient Demon Level Sky Swallowing Demon Dragon.

Ye Tian couldn't get close to the eight-headed Sky Devouring Demon Dragon at the moment, otherwise it would be a mortal situation.

"Bypass that area, with my strength and the replica body that I can sacrifice continuously, I should be able to obtain a lot of resources from the Dragon Swallow Pool. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

So in the following days, Ye Tiandu avoided the sleeping place of the Ancient Demon Level Sky Devouring Demon Dragon, and went to other core areas to find resources, but whenever he obtained a lot of resources, he would send them out in time.

And just like that, time flies.

Ye Tian obtained a lot of resources from Long Tun Tan, and also found a lot of resources that would help him.

"Go back to cultivation first, raise your cultivation to the extreme of the king level, and then go to the emperor level!"

Ye Tian decided.

......

And not long after Ye Tian left, among the Dragon Disciple Tribe, three emperor-level people came back from the outside world, and they came back secretly, and the other clansmen didn't know.

Dragonsman Tribe, Conference Hall.

The Old Ancestor Dragon Shadow, the Patriarch Long Long, and several other elders were all here, and they were all top-notch emperor-level existences.

And the three emperors who came back were the three top emperors who had disappeared for a long time and were even rumored to have fallen.

They are Longshu, Longchen, and Long?, I think they were also incomparably demonic existences, with the existence of breaking through the ancient demon level.

Unfortunately, they have no hope of breaking through.

"Long Shu, have you found any other way to break through to the ancient demon level? ？"

Dragon Shadow asked.

Long Shu shook his head, "Ancestor, we have all found it, there is no way to break through, the Dragon Prison Technique that the Golden God Department has asked us to practice has completely locked the potential of our bodies, no matter what method is used, there is no way to break through, we can only make that decision." "

"Damn the Golden God Ministry, seeing that our dragon disciple tribe has great potential and is likely to give birth to a few ancient demon levels, he forcibly let us practice the Dragon Prisoner Technique. The Dragon Prison Technique can indeed increase the combat power by fifty percent, but once cultivated, it will be completely impossible to break through to the ancient demon level, and can only become a thug of the Golden God Department for the rest of his life. In the past countless years, for the sake of the Golden God Tribe, our Dragon Disciple Tribe has fallen more than a dozen emperor-level existences, maybe one day, a disaster comes, and the Dragon Disciple Tribe will also turn into ashes. Long Ying sighed.

"Ancestor, we can't hesitate, we must carry out that plan, once the plan is successful, we all have hope of breaking through to the ancient demon level. Patriarch Long Long said.

"Well, it's time to do it, have you all collected your stuff?" asked Ryukage again.

Long Shu nodded: "Ancestor, we have been to many territories, all of which are territories that the Golden God Tribe cannot touch, and after countless years of exploration and collection, we have finally raised enough materials to awaken the Ancient Demon-level Sky Devouring Demon Dragon and repair the injuries of his soul will." When the time comes, with the help of the Sky Devouring Demon Dragon, we will be transformed into a clan, and we will be able to completely smash the mark of the Dragon Prison Technique, and we can even break through to the Ancient Demon Level. "

"Okay, then go to the Dragon Swallowing Pond and discuss it with the eight-headed Sky Devouring Demon Dragon, without their consent, we can't arrange the formation. Dragon Shadow said.

"Well, I'll do it!" said Patriarch Tatsuki.

"Okay, then Tatsuki you go!"

Dragon Shadow Road.

......

Dragon Swallow Pond.

Soon.

Long Long came, and came to the place where the ancient demon-level Sky Devouring Demon Dragon was sleeping.

Rumble!!!!

The eight-headed Sky Devouring Demon Dragon stared at Long Long, as if it was about to attack in the next moment.

However, they also recognized Tatsuki, so they didn't make a move.

"Eight, we in the Dragonfall tribe have gathered enough materials to help Lord Proz regain his soul will and wake up from his slumber. Tatsutaki said.

"Really?"

An emperor-level Sky Swallowing Demon Dragon asked.

"Really!" Long Long affirmed, "However, as discussed before, we need to transform into the family of Lord Proz, and turn into the Celestial Demon Dragon Dragonborn clan!"

"No problem!"

The Eight-Headed Sky Devouring Demon Dragon agreed.

Immediately, Long Long went back and informed the other emperor-level situations.

Then, Long Ying, Long Long, Long Chen and the others brought all the materials and came to the sleeping place of the Ancient Demon-level Sky Devouring Demon Dragon Ploz, and began to arrange the formation.

Time passed, and after a period of time, the formations were arranged.

There are formations to repair the will of the soul, and there are formations to transform into clans.

After everything was ready, the eight Sky Devouring Demon Dragons were still guarding their side, and they were also worried about the dragon tribe cheating.

But their master is the pinnacle ancient demon level, even if the dragon disciple tribe is powerful, deliberately pit the sea lord, it will not be able to cause harm to the lord.

Of course, they are still very careful to prevent this from happening.

"'~Let's start!'

One after another precious resources were taken out, and under the urging of the formation, they turned into streamers, which merged into the body of the ancient demon-level Sky Devouring Demon Dragon Ploz, repairing his soul will.

Gradually, Ploz's soul aura became stronger and stronger, and the aura on his body became more and more powerful.

Of course, it will take a long time to completely restore it.

Another period of time has passed, and the Ancient Demon-level Sky Devouring Demon Dragon is about to recover from its injuries.

this day. (Good Wang Zhao)

Rumble!!!

The Ancient Demon-level Sky Devouring Demon Dragon opened its eyes and woke up.

At the same time, the formation of the Transformation Clan was urged, and the eight Heaven Devouring Demon Dragons immediately told Lord Pleoz about the situation.

Besides, with one more family, maybe you can also cultivate a few Gu Demon-level subordinates, which is a good thing.

Soon.

Plotz's aura began to merge into the Dragonshadow and them, beginning to transform them into the Dragonborn of the Sky Swallowing Dragon.

At this time, the Dragon Prison Technique appeared, as if to stop all this.

But under the impact of Pleoz's breath, the dragon prison imprint was shattered after all.
